stories.headline: Christian Löffler Brings Ambient Electronic Magic to Seattle
stories.body: German electronic producer Christian Löffler performs his atmospheric live set this Saturday evening at Nectar Lounge. Known for blending organic instrumentation with electronic beats, his orbit (live) show promises a transcendent sonic experience.

stories.headline: The Notebook Musical Opens at The Paramount
stories.body: The beloved Nicholas Sparks romance comes to life as a Broadway musical with songs by Ingrid Michaelson. This touring production features the emotional story of Allie and Noah, reimagined with live music and dance for the stage.
stories.location: Downtown · March 7-8 at The Paramount Theatre

stories.headline: Balkan Night Northwest Brings Authentic Folk Music
stories.body: This celebration of Balkan culture features multiple bands, traditional dancing, authentic food, and performances from countries between Italy and Turkey. The evening includes both cultural performances and opportunities to dance along.
stories.location: Capitol Hill · Friday, March 14 at St. Demetrios Church

stories.headline: Festival of Color Celebrates Holi With Rainbow Powder
stories.body: Join 10,000 people for this free Hindu spring festival featuring music, dancers, food vendors, and the iconic colored powder throwing tradition. Admission and parking are free at Redmond City Hall Campus.

stories.headline: Brazilian Street Food Star Baiana Debuts Pike Place
stories.body: Former Chopped and Beat Bobby Flay champion Emme Ribeiro Collins opens her eight-seat Afro-Brazilian counter featuring dishes like moqueca and acarajé. Her pop-ups routinely sell out, making this Pike Place Market debut highly anticipated.
stories.location: Pike Place Market · Opening Late February/Early March

stories.headline: US Women's Soccer Takes On Japan at Lumen Field
stories.body: The US Women's National Team faces Japan in an international friendly presented by Allstate. This high-profile match brings world-class soccer to Seattle's iconic stadium.

stories.headline: Penn Cove MusselFest Returns With Farm Tours
stories.body: This beloved Pacific Northwest seafood celebration offers mussel farm boat tours, cooking demonstrations, chowder tastings, beer and wine garden, and mussel-eating competitions at Coupeville's historic wharf.

stories.headline: Seattle Symphony Celebrates 75 Years of Peanuts
stories.body: The Seattle Symphony presents a special tribute to Snoopy, Woodstock, Charlie Brown and friends for the 75th anniversary of Peanuts, featuring iconic music from the beloved TV specials and movies.

stories.headline: Seattle Miniature Show Features 40 Vendors
stories.body: This $15 family-friendly event showcases miniature exhibits, 40 vendors selling dollhouse items, and hands-on workshops at the DoubleTree Suites Southcenter. Children under 12 get free admission.
